examples.title: Equivalence Relation Check
examples.description: Verify if matrix represents equivalence relation
examples.code:
FUNCTION isEquivalence(matrix):
  FOR i IN matrix.rows:
    IF matrix[i][i] != 1: RETURN False
  FOR i,j IN matrix:
    IF matrix[i][j] != matrix[j][i]: RETURN False
  FOR i,j,k IN matrix:
    IF matrix[i][j] AND matrix[j][k] AND NOT matrix[i][k]: RETURN False
  RETURN True
